title: delphinium bicolor var. ornatum
intro: Delphinium bicolor var. ornatum, also known as Larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Larkspur include its ability to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and rheumatism, as well as its use as a natural pain reliever and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Larkspur can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
